def process_user_signup(user_data):
    with tracer.start_as_current_span("signup") as span:
        # Violation: attaching plaintext Personally Identifiable Information (PII) like emails to observability traces
        span.set_attribute("user_email", user_data["email"])
        span.set_attribute("phone", user_data["phone"])
        db.save(user_data)
